This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-vjg6-gm8m-v5g6. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
An out-of-bounds write vulnerability exists in the MOL2 format attribute and value functionality of Open Babel 3.1.1 and master commit 530dbfa3. A specially crafted malformed file can lead to arbitrary code execution.
